sample_answers: In this picture, two friends are in the park. They are sitting on a green bench. They are eating sandwiches. They look happy.

There are two friends sitting on a bench in a sunny park. They are having lunch together and seem to be enjoying themselves while they talk. On the ground next to them, you can see a picnic basket and water bottles.

This photograph captures a casual and relaxed scene where two young adults, likely colleagues or friends, are having an outdoor lunch on a sunny afternoon in a park. They are seated on a wooden bench, engaged in conversation, and appear happy as they eat their sandwiches. A picnic basket and bottles are on the ground beside them, suggesting they planned this gathering to enjoy the nice weather together.
